data_description.provider: VRR, KVV, HVV, BVG, MVV, VVS, VAG, VRN, VVO, DING, AVV, RVV, RMV, SBB, ÖBB, Transitous, Trafiklab or NTA

stop_search.title: Search Stop/Station
stop_search.description:
Enter the name of your stop.
For better results use the format: **Stop, City**

Example: Holthausen, Düsseldorf

stop_select.title: Select Stop
stop_select.description: Found {count} results for "{search_term}". Select your stop or start a new search:

data_description.nta_api_key: NTA Primary API key (required, available at developer.nationaltransport.ie)
data_description.nta_api_key_secondary: NTA Secondary API key (optional, used as fallback)

data_description.departures: How many departures should be displayed? (1-20)
data_description.transportation_types: Which transport types should be displayed?
data_description.scan_interval: How often should data be updated? (10-3600 seconds)
data_description.use_provider_logo: Show the provider logo instead of the transport type icon
data_description.delay_threshold: Minimum delay in minutes to trigger the delay sensor (1-30)
data_description.line_filter: Only show specific lines, comma-separated (e.g. U79, RE5, Bus 42). Empty = all lines
data_description.walking_time: Walking time to stop in minutes (0 = disabled). Departures that can no longer be reached are hidden
data_description.favorite_lines: Comma-separated lines to show first (e.g. U79, RE5). Empty = no favorites

multi_stop.title: Configure Multi-Stop

error.missing_location: Please provide either a station ID or location and stop name
error.no_results: No results found. Please try a different search term.
error.min_two_entities: Please provide at least 2 entity IDs

data_description.use_provider_logo: Show the provider logo instead of the transport type icon
data_description.delay_threshold: Minimum delay in minutes to trigger the delay sensor (1-30)
data_description.line_filter: Only show specific lines, comma-separated (e.g. U79, RE5, Bus 42). Empty = all lines
data_description.walking_time: Walking time to stop in minutes (0 = disabled). Departures that can no longer be reached are hidden
data_description.favorite_lines: Comma-separated lines to show first (e.g. U79, RE5). Empty = no favorites

rate_limit_reached.title: API Rate Limit Reached
rate_limit_reached.description: The daily API limit of {limit} requests for {provider} has been reached. The integration will automatically resume tomorrow. Consider increasing the update interval.

api_error.title: API Error
api_error.description: There was an error retrieving data from {provider}. Please check your station ID or stop information in the settings.
